title: Elbaf’s Crisis Converges
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Zoro, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Dorry, Brogy as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dorry, Brogy... It's unthinkable to see you like this...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What's this plan of yours, Roronoa zoro?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: First things first, is it okay if I cut those guys down?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: it is... but we're up against the entire giant warrior crew!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Saving Elder Jarul is our top priority..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But these warriors have all earned our respect. Try to spare their pride at least...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, did you finish your quest to unite all the giants of the world?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah right! By now, they have to know that's never going to happen. Zu Gya Gya Gya gya gya gya gya gya gya gya gya gya gya gya gya gya gya gya gya gya gya gya

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see! You won't get trapped between them if you approach from above!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: stansen, let's circle round them from the sides!!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
